name: Smart Money Trading (SMT)
description: Transparent multi-persona AI trading agent: reads CoinMarketCap data, decides via 6 personas + a learned Judge, explains every call, and trades on BNB Chain via Trust Wallet — inside hard risk guardrails.

transparency: white-box persona votes + counterfactual faithfulness check
